summary: Full 3D scene and asset audit. 8 findings (1 CRITICAL, 2 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM, 2 PASS). Verified S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL-V2 as correctly implemented (false positive reopen). Fixed GDC-FOREST3D-STALE-DRAIN (removed life -= 1 per card per director decision).

findings.description: BroceliandeForest3D.tscn is a minimal stub (Node + script only, no child nodes). broceliande_forest_3d.gd has 17 @onready vars referencing $World3D/*, $HUD/* — all resolve to null. _setup_viewport():647 calls world_root.get_parent() on null → instant crash when scene is loaded.

Assets/3d_models/ directory completely absent. Menu3D references res://Assets/3d_models/menu_coast/*.glb (9 files). Handled gracefully via ResourceLoader.exists() — no crash but 3D menu background is empty. Director wants celtic aesthetic menu.

OLD_TREES and OLD_MEGALITHS arrays reference res://Assets/3d_models/vegetation/*.glb and res://Assets/3d_models/broceliande/megaliths/*.glb — neither path exists. Assets/3d_models/ dir missing. Silent fail via ResourceLoader.exists().

const TILE_BASE := 'res://archive/3d_models/Tiles_Low_Poly/' declared but NEVER used in file or referenced elsewhere. Points to archive/ not Assets/Tiles/. Active tiles are in Assets/Tiles/ (Tiles 01-31). Dead constant misleads future devs.

const BK_BIOME: String = 'foret_broceliande' is hardcoded. All 8 biomes in BiomeWalkConfigs share the same foret_broceliande BK assets. Biomes landes_bruyere, cotes_sauvages, etc. load forest trees/rocks even when they should have different assets.
Run3D.tscn is also a stub (Node + script). run_3d_controller.gd does NOT use @onready vars — it receives all dependencies via injection. This is INTENTIONAL headless design. PASS.

S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL-V2: arc_condition_type dispatcher IS correctly implemented. Lines 97-103 select arc_actual_value per type (faction_rep/runs_in_biome/fins_vues/oghams_owned). Line 104 >= comparison correct for all types. merlin_skeleton_generator.gd correctly passes biome-specific faction rep. VERIFIED PASS — task was false-positive reopen.

GDC-FOREST3D-STALE-DRAIN: Removed life -= 1 per card drain (director decision q-20260412-001 'Aucun drain de vie a chaque carte'). Updated life_change calculations (+5/−8/0 instead of +4/−9/−1). Updated neutral message to 'La foret observe en silence.'
